debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
p_large_enough : Fact (p > 512)
programSize : ℕ
inst✝¹ : NeZero programSize
program : Fin programSize → F p
h_programSize : programSize < p
memorySize : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero memorySize
memory : Fin memorySize → F p
h_memorySize : memorySize < p
⊢ InductiveTable.Completeness (F p) State unit (fun x x => True) (fun x => True)
    (fun initial_state x i x state =>
      @Examples.FemtoCairo.nextStateCircuit.match_3 p (fun x => Prop)
        (Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution program memory (some initial_state) i)
        (fun reachedState => state = reachedState) fun _ => False)
    fun state x =>
    (fun input =>
        subcircuitWithAssertion
          (Examples.FemtoCairo.femtoCairoStepCircuit p inst✝² p_large_enough programSize inst✝¹ program h_programSize
            memorySize inst✝ memory h_memorySize)
          input)
      state

failed_attempts:
state h_spec
    simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
    split at h_spec
    case h_2 => contradiction
    case h_1 prevState h_prev =>
      intro ih
      simp_all [Option.bind_some]

state h_spec
    induction i generalizing state with
    | zero => simp_all [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution]
    | succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec
      split at h_spec
      · simp only [Option.bind_some] at h_spec
        exact ⟨_, ih _ rfl, (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize _).completeness (by simp [femtoCairoAssumptions]) (by simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_spec])⟩
      · contradiction

simp_all [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, femtoCairoCircuitSpec]
    split at *
    case h_1 next_state h_eq =>
      apply (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness
      · exact True.intro
      · exact ⟨next_state, h_eq⟩
    case h_2 => contradiction

state h_spec

        simp_all [Spec.femtoCairoMachineTransition, femtoCairoStepCircuit, femtoCairoCircuitSpec]

some prev_state =>

        apply GeneralFormalCircuit.completeness

state h
    induction i generalizing state with
    | zero =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h
      subst h; use []
    | succ i ih =>
      simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h

      case h_1 prev_state h_trans =>

        obtain ⟨env', h_env'⟩ := (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness prev_state trivial state (by simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_trans, h])
        use env ++ env'
        simp [h_env, h_env', h_trans, h]
      case h_2 => contradiction

state _ _ h
    induction i generalizing initial_state
    · simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h; subst h; use []
    · simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h
      split at h <;> [rename_i s1 h_step; contradiction]
      obtain ⟨w_rest, h_w_rest⟩ := ih h
      obtain ⟨w_step, h_w_step⟩ := (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness initial_state (by simp [femtoCairoAssumptions]) s1 (by simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_step])
      use w_step ++ w_rest; simp [h_w_step, h_w_rest]

state h_spec
    induction i generalizing state
    case zero =>

    case succ n ih =>

      obtain ⟨prev_state, h_prev, h_step⟩ := h_spec
      exact ⟨prev_state, ih prev_state h_prev, h_step⟩

state h_spec
    induction i generalizing initial_state state
    · simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution] at h_spec; subst h_spec; constructor
    · simp [Spec.femtoCairoMachineBoundedExecution, Option.bind_eq_bind] at h_spec
      split at h_spec <;> [rename_i h; contradiction]

      simp only [Option.some.injEq] at h; subst h
      exact ⟨_, ih _ _ h_prev, by simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, *]⟩

some prev_state =>
        simp [h_prev] at h_spec
        obtain ⟨env, h_env⟩ := ih h_prev
        obtain ⟨step_env, h_step_env⟩ := (femtoCairoStepCircuit program h_programSize memory h_memorySize).completeness prev_state () (h_assumptions i (Nat.lt_succ_self i)) _ (by simp [femtoCairoCircuitSpec, h_spec])
        exact ⟨env ++ step_env, by simp [h_env, h_step_env]⟩

state_var input_var state input h1 h2 h_inputs reached_state h_spec

    case h_1 prev_state h_prev_spec =>

state h_spec
    induction i generalizing initial_state state with
